## Problem

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Relevant Files

- `path/to/file.tsx`

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
